hero.subtext: Founders work with us to further professionalize customer-facing teams for predictable growth.

problem.headline:
What the best founders
see differently
problem.card1Text: Top founders don't leave their sales to chance. They have a system — reproducible, measurable, scalable.
problem.card2Text: Working harder works to a point. Then you need leverage: better processes, better people, better leadership.
problem.card3Text: The best leaders weren't born that way. They systematically trained their skills — that's exactly what we do with you.
problem.card4Text: 867+ founders and executives have already worked with us. Your challenge isn't unique — your solution will be.

coaches.headline: Two Disciplines. One Outcome.
coaches.subtext: 500+ founders coached, €50M+ revenue built. We bring Revenue Systems and Transformational Leadership together.

markus.name: Markus Eilers
markus.bio: 15+ years of B2B sales. Has helped 500+ founders and executives build reproducible, systematic revenue growth.

aljona.name: Aljona Eilers
aljona.bio: TEDx Speaker. Expert in leadership culture, scaling, and personal transformation. Helps founders reach their next level.

academy.headline: SalesMade Academy
academy.step1Text: Build your sales system: positioning, pipeline, messaging — with an individual learning path.
academy.step2Text: Live coaching with a top coach who is not "for hire". Real deals, real results.
academy.subtext: How we make the best salespeople even better — and give the remaining 82% a real chance to meet expectations and achieve their goals.
academy.step1Desc: Each participant goes through a realistic customer scenario where 13 critical sales skills are individually measured.
academy.step2Desc: From the benchmark we build a custom development plan per seller — with adapted scenarios across 5 difficulty levels.

programme.headline: Find Your Starting Point
programme.card1Text: The path to predictable revenue for your growing B2B company — structured in 13 clear steps.
programme.card2Text: For leaders who sense their team has more to give — and want to know how to unlock it.
programme.card3Text: Revenue Systems + Transformational Leadership — for when you are ready to tackle both at once.

hvco.headline: Start now — for free
hvco.resource1Text: The complete PDF guide: How to build a reproducible sales system in 90 days.
hvco.resource2Text: Find out where your sales really stand — in 5 minutes.
hvco.resource3Text: The 3 biggest mistakes in B2B sales — and how to avoid them immediately.
